data.title: Distributed Denial of Service (DDoS) Protection
data.description: Mitigates large-scale DDoS attacks to ensure availability.
data.technical_spec: Integration with Google's Cloud Armor service.

data.title: User Data Encryption
data.description: Ensures user data is encrypted during transmission.
data.technical_spec: TLS encryption for data in transit, PGP for certain data storage.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts periodic security audits to identify vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Automated and manual audits with third-party penetration testing.

data.title: Account Security Features
data.description: Two-factor authentication for user accounts to prevent unauthorized access.

data.title: Content Moderation Systems
data.description: Automated and manual detection systems for inappropriate content.
data.technical_spec: AI-driven algorithms supported by human reviewers.
